message:
test(core): entropy_scheduler + VOI composition integration tests (19 total)

Add 3 cross-module integration tests:
- entropy_scheduler_composes_with_voi_scheduler: density as VOI importance
- entropy_scheduler_consistent_with_batch_entropy: streaming vs batch
- entropy_voi_pipeline_allocates_capture_budget: 5-pane mixed workload

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.2.1","title":"Define versioned recorder event schema for ingress/egress mux text","description":"## Goal
Define a versioned canonical event schema for mux ingress/egress text capture, including metadata needed for replay, search filtering, and causality analysis.

## Background
Schema ambiguity will invalidate downstream indexing and replay. This bead establishes the ground-truth contract.

## Scope
- Define event types (ingress text, egress output, control markers, lifecycle markers).
- Define required metadata (pane/session/workflow correlation IDs, timestamps, sequence numbers, source).
- Define schema evolution/versioning rules and compatibility tests.

## Deliverables
- Recorder event schema spec and serialization contract.
- JSON-schema or equivalent testable schema artifact.

## Acceptance criteria
- Schema is precise enough for independent producer/consumer implementation.
- Evolution rules cover additive and breaking changes explicitly.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WildBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.66701Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T02:11:46.35793-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T02:11:46.35793-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented recorder event schema types in recording.rs: RecorderEvent, RecorderEventPayload (4 variants), RecorderEventSource, RecorderEventCausality, 6 supporting enums, RECORDER_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION_V1 constant, parse_recorder_event_json() with version validation. All 5 schema contract tests pass. JSON schema at docs/flight-recorder/ft-recorder-event-v1.json verified.","labels":["capture","flight-recorder","schema"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.1","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.66701Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","title":"Implement ingress tap points for all mux-bound text/action injections","description":"## Goal
Implement ingress capture tap points (text/actions entering mux/panes) with minimal overhead and explicit source attribution.

## Background
Ingress visibility is required for full forensic replay and for understanding operator/agent actions leading to outcomes.

## Scope
- Identify ingress boundaries and hook locations.
- Capture payload + metadata in canonical schema.
- Ensure capture path does not break policy gating behavior.

## Deliverables
- Ingress capture implementation plan + instrumentation tests.
- Validation that policy decisions and ingress logs remain consistent.

## Acceptance criteria
- Ingress events are captured for all supported injection paths.
- Overhead budget for ingress capture is documented and met in benchmarks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.699328Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T02:45:26.001155-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T02:45:26.001155-05:00","close_reason":"Ingress tap integrated into PolicyGatedInjector with 8 integration tests","labels":["capture","ingress","mux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.699328Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.864528Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","title":"Implement egress tap points with contiguous segment + explicit gap semantics","description":"## Goal
Implement egress capture tap points (pane/mux output leaving runtime paths) with contiguous segment semantics and explicit gap markers.

## Background
Egress capture is the primary data source for replay and search; it must preserve ordering and discontinuity semantics.

## Scope
- Hook egress at the authoritative output pipeline.
- Emit explicit discontinuity markers where continuity cannot be guaranteed.
- Preserve compatibility with existing ingest/pattern detection semantics.

## Deliverables
- Egress capture instrumentation with segment/gap semantics.
- Regression tests for continuity/gap behavior.

## Acceptance criteria
- Egress events are complete for observed panes.
- Gap semantics are explicit and machine-detectable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WildBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.731497Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T03:10:23.179118-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T03:10:23.179118-05:00","close_reason":"Egress tap integrated into TailerSupervisor with 7 passing integration tests","labels":["capture","egress","ingest"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.731497Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.894294Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
-{"id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","title":"Define deterministic sequence + correlation model for replayable causality","description":"## Goal
Define deterministic sequence and correlation rules across ingress/egress streams so replay/search can reconstruct causality.

## Background
Raw timestamps alone are insufficient under concurrency. We need deterministic ordering semantics and correlation keys.

## Scope
- Define sequence assignment rules per pane and global merge strategy.
- Define correlation metadata (pane UUID/session/workflow/action linkage).
- Define clock-skew and race-handling behavior.

## Deliverables
- Ordering/correlation specification.
- Determinism and replay correctness test plan.

## Acceptance criteria
- Ordering rules are unambiguous and test-assertable.
- Replay results are stable across repeated runs on same input.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WildBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.764919Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T03:28:49.640338-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T03:28:49.640338-05:00","close_reason":"Spec complete at docs/flight-recorder/sequence-correlation-model.md (delivered by OrangeBarn in wa-oegrb.2.4). Code has IngressSequence, GlobalSequence, seq_discontinuity handling aligned with spec. Validation plan documented.","labels":["capture","ordering","replay"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.764919Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.925809Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.955931Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
+{"id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","title":"Define deterministic sequence + correlation model for replayable causality","description":"## Goal
Define deterministic sequence and correlation rules across ingress/egress streams so replay/search can reconstruct causality.

## Background
Raw timestamps alone are insufficient under concurrency. We need deterministic ordering semantics and correlation keys.

## Scope
- Define sequence assignment rules per pane and global merge strategy.
- Define correlation metadata (pane UUID/session/workflow/action linkage).
- Define clock-skew and race-handling behavior.

## Deliverables
- Ordering/correlation specification.
- Determinism and replay correctness test plan.

## Acceptance criteria
- Ordering rules are unambiguous and test-assertable.
- Replay results are stable across repeated runs on same input.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WildBeaver","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.764919Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T15:50:16.951306-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T15:50:16.951306-05:00","close_reason":"Deterministic sequence model implemented in sequence_model.rs (670 lines, 41 tests). SequenceAssigner (per-pane + global atomic), ReplayOrder (lexicographic total order), CorrelationContext/Tracker (auto parent chains, batch IDs), ClockSkewDetector (diagnostic), validate_replay_order. JSON schema updated with global_sequence + batch_id. Committed in 8d512c90.","labels":["capture","ordering","replay"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.764919Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.925809Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.4","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.955931Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.2.5","title":"Define capture-stage redaction policy and deterministic implementation boundaries","description":"## Goal
Specify and implement capture-stage redaction boundaries so sensitive tokens are protected without destroying search/replay utility.

## Background
A full recorder introduces privacy/security risk. Redaction policy must be explicit early, not bolted on later.

## Scope
- Define sensitive-pattern classes and redaction modes.
- Define where redaction is applied (before persist, before index, before query response).
- Define auditability for redaction actions.

## Deliverables
- Redaction policy and implementation requirements.
- Tests for deterministic redaction behavior and false-positive guardrails.

## Acceptance criteria
- Sensitive fields are consistently protected across storage/index/API layers.
- Redaction behavior is measurable and tunable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseCastle","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.797785Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T08:27:52.0074Z","closed_at":"2026-02-12T08:27:52.007381Z","close_reason":"Redaction policy contract reconciled and traceability links added for ft lineage","labels":["capture","privacy","redaction","security"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.5","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.797785Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.5","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.987531Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}],"comments":[{"id":31,"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.5","author":"RoseCastle","text":"Completed ft-side reconciliation for this bead. Verified and updated redaction policy contract in docs/flight-recorder/capture-redaction-policy.md to explicitly cover both wa/ft bead lineages and downstream ft dependents, and added a direct cross-link from docs/flight-recorder/recorder-event-schema.md for implementation traceability. Acceptance coverage: deterministic boundaries, protection scope, and tunable/testable redaction contract are all explicitly documented for storage/index/API layers.","created_at":"2026-02-12T08:27:46Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.2.6","title":"Specify and validate capture backpressure/overflow behavior under swarm load","description":"## Goal
Define capture-path backpressure/failure semantics and verify behavior under overload so recorder does not destabilize core watcher operations.

## Background
Recorder capture must fail safely under stress; silent degradation is unacceptable.

## Scope
- Define queueing and overflow policy (drop/slow/spool) with rationale.
- Define telemetry and alerting conditions.
- Validate with overload and fault injection tests.

## Deliverables
- Backpressure policy doc and implementation plan.
- Overload test scenarios with expected outcomes.

## Acceptance criteria
- Overload behavior is deterministic and observable.
- Core watcher stability is preserved under recorder stress.","notes":"Claimed by BoldBarn for backpressure/overflow policy + validation work","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldBarn","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.831967Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T03:30:15.02752-05:00","closed_at":"2026-02-12T03:30:15.02752-05:00","close_reason":"Documented deterministic backpressure/overflow policy in docs/flight-recorder/capture-backpressure-overflow-policy.md for ft-oegrb.2.6 and validated with targeted tests: overflow_gap (8), scheduler_ (30), backpressure_warning_ (2), integration_slow_consumer_overflow (1).","labels":["backpressure","capture","reliability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.6","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:11.831967Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.6","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:12.018117Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.2.6","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:04:12.048557Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"ft-oegrb.3","title":"Storage track: append-only writer path + backend abstraction + FrankenSQLite integration","description":"## Track objective
Build the append-only persistence path for flight-recorder events, including backend abstraction, high-throughput writer path, and FrankenSQLite integration path with safe fallback.

## Why this track exists
Logging quality is bounded by write-path reliability and throughput. This track ensures durability under load while preserving rollout safety.

## Deliverables
- Storage abstraction for recorder log backends
- Baseline backend (for immediate bring-up)
- FrankenSQLite backend plan/integration path
- Crash recovery/replay and corruption handling strategy

## Acceptance criteria
- Sustained append throughput targets are met under concurrent writer load.
- Failure modes are explicit and exercised in automated tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:02:58.285668Z","created_by":"WildSpring","updated_at":"2026-02-12T06:09:16.717242Z","labels":["append-only","flight-recorder","frankensqlite","storage"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.3","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:02:58.285668Z","created_by":"WildSpring","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.3","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:09:16.678028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"ft-oegrb.3","depends_on_id":"ft-oegrb.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-12T06:09:16.717172Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}"}]}
